allow: PowerShell($ids = @\('1600596542815-ffad4c1539a9','1416879595882-3373a0480b5b','1500382017468-9049fed747ef','1559827260-dc66d52bef19','1512917774080-9991f1c4c750'\); foreach \($id in $ids\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-$id?w=100" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "$id => $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "$id => FAIL" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://unsplash.com/napi/search/photos?query=luxury%20villa%20pool&per_page=6&orientation=landscape" -TimeoutSec 30 -UseBasicParsing; $r.results | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("{0} | {1} | {2}" -f $_.id, $_.urls.raw.Split\('?'\)[0], $_.alt_description\) } } catch { Write-Output "FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
